summary: Tested YouTube Training Videos (E033) and Amadeus Pet-Friendly Hotels (E034) integration in Mira chat. All features working correctly - YouTube videos appear when asking training questions, Amadeus hotels appear when asking about travel to cities.

api_tests.youtube_connection: PASS - YouTube API returns training videos successfully
api_tests.youtube_by_topic: PASS - Returns 3 videos for 'stop barking' with thumbnail, title, channel
api_tests.youtube_by_breed: PASS - Returns videos specific to Golden Retriever breed
api_tests.youtube_by_age: PASS - Returns life_stage and age-appropriate videos
api_tests.amadeus_city_codes: PASS - 32 Indian cities available (Mumbai=BOM, Delhi=DEL, etc.)
api_tests.amadeus_hotels_mumbai: PASS - Returns 3 pet-friendly hotels with directions
api_tests.amadeus_hotels_delhi: PASS - Returns hotels with city_code DEL
api_tests.amadeus_hotels_goa: PASS - Returns hotels with city_code GOI
api_tests.amadeus_invalid_city: PASS - Returns error for unknown cities
api_tests.training_keywords: PASS - 15 training keywords trigger YouTube videos
api_tests.city_keywords: PASS - 9 city keywords trigger Amadeus hotels
api_tests.video_card_structure: PASS - Video response has id, title, thumbnail, channel, url
api_tests.hotel_card_structure: PASS - Hotel response has id, name, pet_friendly_likelihood, pet_policy_note

frontend_tests.learn_chip: PASS - 'Learn' test scenario chip triggers YouTube videos
frontend_tests.hotels_chip: PASS - 'Hotels' test scenario chip triggers Amadeus hotels
frontend_tests.training_videos_section: PASS - 'Training Videos for [Pet]' section displayed with video cards
frontend_tests.video_card_display: PASS - Shows thumbnail, title, channel, play button overlay
frontend_tests.hotel_card_display: PASS - Shows name, pet-friendly badge (when applicable), distance

features_verified: YouTube training videos appear in chat when asking training questions (e.g., 'How do I train my dog to stop barking?')
Amadeus hotels appear in chat when asking about travel to cities (e.g., 'Find pet-friendly hotels in Mumbai')
'Learn' test scenario chip triggers YouTube videos
'Hotels' test scenario chip triggers Amadeus hotels
Video cards show thumbnail, title, channel, and play button
Hotel cards show name, pet-friendly badge, distance, and Directions button
Get Directions button opens Google Maps with correct destination
context_for_next_testing_agent: YouTube and Amadeus integrations fully tested. YouTube API uses real API with config from env vars. Amadeus API uses OAuth token with API key/secret from env vars. Frontend detects training keywords and city names to trigger respective integrations. Video cards link to YouTube, hotel Directions buttons link to Google Maps.
screenshots: 04_youtube_videos.png - Shows 3 training videos with thumbnails and play buttons
05_amadeus_hotels.png - Shows pet-friendly hotels in Mumbai with Directions buttons
